body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1","coverage":"child 1 AC 1"},{"parent_ac":"2","coverage":"child 2 AC 1"},{"parent_ac":"3","coverage":"child 1 AC 2; child 2 AC 2"},{"parent_ac":"4","coverage":"child 2 AC 3"},{"parent_ac":"5","coverage":"child 1 AC 4; child 2 AC 4"}],"child_ids":["ddx-26bf19c7","ddx-c7614226"],"rationale":"Two child beads cleanly separate the regression into a spawn-tripwire concern and a subprocess-reaping concern while preserving the parent’s scope fences, file references, and verification gates. Both children remain self-contained, each can be executed cold from the same fixture file, and the acceptance map covers every parent criterion without dropping any required verification."}
